data.name: Offside
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關注焦點


關於此遊戲




“Offside” is Detective Mystery Sports Game and Yuri Dating Simulator set in Manchester, in the North of England. Play as Detective Inspector Linda Broadmarsh as she is put on one of the highest profile cases in all of Manchester’s history. Help her solve this mystery while dealing with the strained relationship she has with her father, a famous goalkeeper, and keeping her ailing love life alive.


Will Linda solve this massive case?

Will she and her father ever make peace?

Will she meet the woman of her dreams and fall madly in love?

Only you can find out by playing “Offside”!





- A gripping and mysterious storyline
- Beautiful Anime-style sprites and artwork
- Cool smooth jazz soundtrack
- Epic football-themed minigame
- Meaningful and impactful choices
- Multiple romantic routes
- Many endings!

data.short_description: “Offside” is Detective Mystery Sports Game and Yuri Dating Simulator set in Manchester, in the North of England. Play as Detective Inspector Linda Broadmarsh as she is put on one of the highest profile cases in all of Manchester’s history.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista / 7 / 8/ 8.1/ 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® 4 2.0 GHz equivalent or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista / 7 / 8/ 8.1/ 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® 4 2.0 GHz equivalent or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 - 10.13
  • 處理器: 1.5GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
